# fork-session

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar buttons (+Sonnet / +Opus) that fork the current conversation via `claude --resume <id> --fork-session`.
- Contributes:
  - `JsonlViewer.RowAction` "fork-session" → `ForkSessionAction`
